startPoint.en: Speak to Hopespear in the Crypt in the Goblin Temple.
startPoint.es: Habla con Hopespear en la Cripta del Templo de los Goblins.

quests: A Fairy Tale I - Growing Pains
A Fairy Tale II - Cure a Queen

items.name: Dramen staff
items.display: Dramen staff or Lunar staff (unless A Fairy Tale III - Battle at Ork's Rift has been completed)

items.name: Ring of visibility
items.display: Ring of visibility or Sliske's gift

items.name: Ghostspeak amulet
items.display: Ghostspeak amulet or cramulet or hard Morytania achievements If you have the cramulet, it will have to be dismantled so you just wear the ghostspeak amulet, otherwise the goblins won't drop their bones. Or you could take off the amulet after speaking to the ghost and before fighting.

items.name: If you have the cramulet, it will have to be dismantled so you just wear the ghostspeak amulet, otherwise the goblins won't drop their bones. Or you could take off the amulet after speaking to the ghost and before fighting.
items.display: If you have the cramulet, it will have to be dismantled so you just wear the ghostspeak amulet, otherwise the goblins won't drop their bones. Or you could take off the amulet after speaking to the ghost and before fighting.

rewards.display: 13,750 experience total from burying all 5 sets of bones (unaffected by any bonus experience).

text.en: Make sure you have 5 free inventory spaces.
text.es: Asegúrate de tener 5 espacios libres en el inventario.

text.en: Head to the cave entrance located just east of the Fishing Guild's entrance. Manor farm Teleport is a quick teleport nearby. Enter the cave and walk north-west until you find two goblin guards guarding the entrance to the temple.
text.es: Dirígete a la entrada de la cueva situada justo al este de la entrada del Fishing Guild. Manor farm Teleport es un teletransporte rápido cercano. Entra en la cueva y camina hacia el noroeste hasta encontrar a dos guardias goblin custodiando la entrada al templo.

text.en: Drink one dose of the goblin potion and climb down the stairs to the north. Do not equip anything when in goblin form.
text.es: Bebe una dosis de la poción de goblin y baja las escaleras hacia el norte. No te equipes nada mientras estés en forma de goblin.

text.en: Once in the temple, enter the crypt through the door to the north. Equip your ring of visibility and amulet of ghostspeak.
text.es: Una vez en el templo, entra en la cripta por la puerta del norte. Equípate el ring of visibility y el amulet of ghostspeak.

text.en: If you have received the ability to see into the Shadow Realm from Sliske, you do not need to equip the ring to see Hopespear.
text.es: Si has recibido de Sliske la habilidad de ver el Shadow Realm, no necesitas equiparte el anillo para ver a Hopespear.

chatOptions: 4 Tell me more about the Chosen Commander.
3 Tell me about the Big High War God.

text.en: For the next part, you have to kill each priest skeleton and collect its bones. Make sure to unequip everything for the whole duration of the fight.
text.es: Para la siguiente parte, tienes que matar a cada esqueleto sacerdote y recoger sus huesos. Asegúrate de desequiparte todo durante toda la duración del combate.

text.en: At the south-west grave, say the name Kill Snothead.
text.es: En la tumba del suroeste, di el nombre Mata a Snothead.

text.en: At the south-east grave, say the name Kill Snailfeet.
text.es: En la tumba del sureste, di el nombre Mata a Snailfeet.

text.en: At the north-west grave, say the name Kill Mosschin.
text.es: En la tumba del noroeste, di el nombre Mata a Mosschin.

text.en: At the north-east grave, say the name Kill Redeyes.
text.es: En la tumba del noreste, di el nombre Mata a Redeyes.

text.en: At the northern grave, say the name Kill Strongbones.
text.es: En la tumba del norte, di el nombre Mata a Strongbones.

text.en: Teleport out and use a fairy ring to BLQ.
text.es: Teletranspórtate fuera y usa un fairy ring para.

text.en: Bury all five newly acquired bones.
text.es: Entierra los cinco huesos recién obtenidos.
